title: Bridge Essay: Changes in high-order interaction measures of synergy and redundancy during non-

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Changes in high-order interaction measures of synergy and redundancy during non-ordinary states of consciousness induced by meditation, hypnosis, and auto-induced cognitive trance.** — Neuroimage. PMID: 38670442. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2024.120623. High-order interactions are required across brain regions to accomplish specific cognitive functions. These functional interdependencies are reflected by synergistic information that can be obtained by combining the information from all the sources considered and redundant information (i.e., common information provided by all the sources). However, electroencephalogram (EEG) functional connectivity is limited to pairwise interactions thereby precluding the estimation of high-order interactions....

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 8 (Formless/Absorption). Evaluation: Excellent (score=13.5)
